lemon_market_new_listings.description: Ready for a rewarding project? This vehicle is the perfect canvas for someone who loves to roll up their sleeves! While it currently requires significant mechanical work and shows substantial wear inside and out, it offers a fantastic, low-cost entry point for a dedicated hobbyist or parts seeker. Grab a bargain and start your next automotive adventure today!

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with age. The interior is well-kept with light signs of use. All mechanical systems are in good working order and have been regularly maintained.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has clearly been well-cared for by its previous owner. The exterior paint retains a nice luster, though you will find some minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper upon close inspection. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of major wear, with all electronics and climate control systems functioning as intended. Mechanically, the car runs smoothly and has a consistent service history, though it may soon be due for standard preventative maintenance like a brake fluid flush. It’s a reliable, solid vehicle that presents well and is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior is clean and well-kept, though you may find a few minor stone chips on the front bumper consistent with regular use. Inside, the upholstery is in great shape with no tears or stains, showing only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car runs smoothly, all features are fully operational, and it has a consistent service history. It is a reliable, solid vehicle that is ready for its next owner.
Good condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Several mechanical and electrical systems require major repair or are non-functional.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, offered in showroom condition. This specimen has been maintained to the most exacting standards, exhibiting a pristine exterior and an interior devoid of wear. A rare opportunity for the discerning individual to acquire a vehicle that transcends the typical pre-owned market. Uncompromising quality for the sophisticated driver.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream. This car is in pristine, mint condition—it’s been babied since day one and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve kept it spotless inside and out, so you’re getting a ride that’s practically brand new. I’m looking for a smooth sale so someone else can start enjoying this beauty right away. Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Presented in exceptional condition, this E46 M3 remains a benchmark of analog performance. It is powered by the S54 3.2L naturally aspirated
One owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws. Interior is spotless. Inspection reports available.

Presenting a truly exceptional example that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom-fresh condition, having been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment by its sole owner. The exterior paint is deep and lustrous, free of any imperfections, stone chips, or swirls, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains a time capsule; the premium leather surfaces are soft and uncreased, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic component functions with factory precision. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive service history detailing preventative maintenance performed exclusively at authorized centers. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched alloy wheels, every detail reflects a life of pampered care. This is an investment-grade vehicle that offers a new-car experience in every sense.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle maintained to an exacting, showroom standard. This specimen exhibits flawless cosmetic integrity and mechanical precision, reflecting a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. With its pristine interior and uncompromising performance profile, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking an investment-grade example. Experience automotive excellence in its most refined form.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. Its condition is flawless, reflecting a level of care that is rarely seen on the secondary market. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from a new showroom model. This represents a premier acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! You've gotta see this absolute gem! I've taken such good care of this beauty, and it's honestly in pristine condition—it looks and drives like it just came off the lot. It's been garage-kept and pampered, so it's ready for its next adventure with someone who will love it just as much as I have. Trust me, you won't find another one this clean! Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and fall in love with your next ride!

This meticulously maintained specimen represents the pinnacle of its generation, featuring a high-revving, naturally aspirated flat-six mated to a crisp six-speed manual transaxle. The mechanical suite is highlighted by a factory-spec limited-slip differential and an adaptive suspension system that remains in peak operating condition. Technical scrutiny reveals impeccable compression across all cylinders and a pristine undercarriage free of fluid seepage or oxidation. The chassis retains its original rigidity, complemented by lightweight forged alloy wheels and cross-drilled rotors with zero lipping. This is an investment-grade vehicle with surgical throttle response and a flawless service history, catering specifically to the discerning enthusiast who demands un
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Fully inspected. Mechanically perfect.

Presenting an absolute gem for the discerning collector or enthusiast. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and pampered since day one. The exterior finish is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like luster with professional ceramic coating and zero imperfections—no stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather seats remain supple and free of any wear, while the carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since new. Mechanically, it is perfect. It has been maintained exclusively at the authorized dealership with a complete, documented service history and all scheduled maintenance performed ahead of time. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a smoke-free, pet-free vehicle with a clean title and no accident history. If you are looking for a vehicle that looks and drives like it just left the factory, this is the one.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. With its flawless exterior and pristine interior, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than absolute excellence.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unrivaled distinction. This specimen has been maintained to an exacting standard, presenting in pristine, showroom condition. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a legacy of meticulous care, offering the discerning driver a benchmark in automotive excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard used market, delivering a driving experience indistinguishable from new.

Hey there! You have to check out this absolute gem! It’s in seriously mint condition—honestly, it feels just like it did the day it left the showroom. I’ve babied this car from day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for something that’s been loved and looks stunning, this is the one for you. I'm so excited for its next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!

This investment-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. The S54 straight-six engine delivers a razor-sharp throttle response via individual throttle bodies, mated to a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission. Mechanical maintenance is exhaustive: the VANOS unit has been professionally serviced, and the subframe has been reinforced to ensure structural rigidity under high lateral loads. Featuring a limited-slip differential and perfectly calibrated suspension geometry, this vehicle offers a visceral driving experience. The exterior and interior are flawless, reflecting a life of climate-controlled storage and meticulous upkeep. No mechanical compromises, no deferred maintenance—simply an uncompromising driver’s machine in showroom condition.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive preservation with this showroom-quality specimen. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior boasts a deep, glass-like luster entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine, factory-fresh condition, featuring supple leather that retains its original scent and premium surfaces that show zero signs of wear. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, accompanied by a comprehensive, documented service history and exceptionally low mileage that reflects its pampered life. Every button, sensor, and mechanical component operates with the factory precision of the day it was first delivered. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to own a truly flawless example of engineering excellence that looks and drives as if it just left the showroom floor.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. Meticulously maintained and presented with surgical precision, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast. A rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such distinguished caliber and unblemished provenance.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior upholstery, reflects a history of meticulous preservation. This vehicle offers an unrivaled driving experience, free from compromise. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition.

Hey guys! 👋 I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in pristine, showroom-level condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! It's been babied since day one, always garaged, and the paint is literally flawless. If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨
This air-cooled 993 Carrera represents the pinnacle of analog engineering. Featuring the M64/21 3.6L flat-six equipped
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Original paint.

Offering a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that presents in showroom condition. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-finish paint job with absolutely no swirls, chips, or dings. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the high-grade leather remains supple and scent-free, with zero wear on the bolsters or controls. Every electronic component, from the climate control to the infotainment system, operates perfectly. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. This car has been climate-control garaged and has never seen inclement weather, resulting in a pristine undercarriage. It drives with the tightness and precision of a brand-new vehicle. Included are all original manuals, two sets of keys, and a comprehensive folder of service records. This is a rare opportunity to own a preserved example of automotive excellence.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen exhibits pristine cosmetic and mechanical integrity, reflecting a level of care that preserves its original showroom quality. An investment-grade opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a pre-owned vehicle in peerless condition.
